  • Uses of SHAFT.GUI.WebDriver in com.shaft.cucumber

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AssertionSteps(ThreadLocal<SHAFT.GUI.WebDriver> driver)
    Creates a new AssertionSteps instance with the supplied thread-local driver.
     
    BrowserSteps(ThreadLocal<SHAFT.GUI.WebDriver> driver)
    Constructs a new BrowserSteps instance, injecting a shared ThreadLocal WebDriver container from the Cucumber IoC context.
